name: Baked Stuffed French Toast
recipeIngredient: 4 large Slices sourdough bread (crusts removed and cubed)
8 oz Cream cheese, cut into cubes
1 large Granny Smith apple, peeled and chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 375°F.
2. Place half of the bread cubes in an ungreased 11 x 7-inch baking dish. Cover with cream cheese cubes, distributing evenly.
3. Sprinkle with chopped apple. Top evenly with the remaining bread cubes.
4. Beat together eggs, milk, and cinnamon until well blended. Pour over the bread mixture in the dish.
5. Bake for about 35 minutes or until set. Sprinkle with powdered sugar.
6. Serve with maple syrup or fruit syrup.
Serves four.
